title: Command Cockpit Event Pulse
summary: Quest level maps now animate recent trail events as compact route packets inside the existing board.

verification.intent: Make the selected path feel active by showing live recent-event motion without adding another scroll row.
verification.layout: The pulse texture and packets are absolutely positioned inside the Quest field and compressed on mobile.
verification.motion: Packets use transform, opacity, and margin-based micro-drift over a project-local procedural route texture.
